title: Universal Darkness│通用黑暗
description: Mobs are also affected by Darkness.│生物也會受到黑暗效果的影響。
body:
# Function│功能
- To put it simply, it makes the mobs only able to see objects within 15 blocks when subject to the darkness effect,just like the effect the player receives.│簡單來說，就是讓生物在受到黑暗效果時只能看到15格內的物體，就像玩家受到的效果一樣。
- The precise explanation is that when a creature is affected by a blinding effect, the value of "Mob Following Range" is reduced to 15, and returned to its original state when the effect wears off.│準確的解釋是，當生物受到失明效果時，將"生物跟隨範圍"的數值減少至15，並在效果消失時恢復到原來的狀態。
